tools.name: apply_material_preset
tools.summary: Apply a built-in material preset for Blender 5.1+ Cycles-oriented packshots.

tools.name: blender_ping
tools.summary: Ping active Blender addon bridge over localhost TCP.

tools.name: build_procedural_jewelry_material
tools.summary: Build and assign a procedural jewelry material with direct Blender API only (no bpy.ops).

tools.name: camera_frame_object
tools.summary: Fit a perspective camera to an object's evaluated world bounding box (bounding-sphere + default quarter view).

tools.name: casting_scale_isotropic
tools.summary: Apply isotropic scaling preset (e.g. for casting shrink compensation).

tools.name: curve_cutter_create
tools.summary: Create a 3D Bezier curve object with solid extrusion (cutter-ready volume) via bpy.data.curves RNA only.

tools.name: export_stl
tools.summary: Export one mesh object to STL with pre-export manifold validation.

tools.name: generate_parametric_solid
tools.summary: Generate a parametric CAD solid directly in Blender (current scope: ring_band).

tools.name: get_blender_operator_schema
tools.summary: Introspect a bpy.ops operator RNA schema (Advertise-and-Activate).

tools.name: jewelry_mass_report
tools.summary: CAD mass report: optionally enforce metric scene units (1 BU = 1 mm), evaluate mesh via Depsgraph,

tools.name: mesh_check_manifold
tools.summary: Check if evaluated mesh is manifold/watertight-like.

tools.name: mesh_get_bbox_mm
tools.summary: Return object bounding-box dimensions in millimeters [x, y, z].

tools.name: mesh_get_materials
tools.summary: Return material slot names assigned to object.

tools.name: mesh_get_volume_cm3
tools.summary: Return evaluated mesh volume in cm^3.

tools.name: node_tool_invoke
tools.summary: Invoke any Blender operator by RNA idname (bpy.ops); use get_blender_operator_schema first.

tools.name: mesh_uv_unwrap_cylinder
tools.summary: UV unwrap mesh via cylinder projection (Z axis, Y align); restores prior interaction mode.

tools.name: modifier_add_boolean_manifold
tools.summary: Add Boolean modifier with solver forced to MANIFOLD.

tools.name: modifier_add_displace
tools.summary: Add or update Displace modifier: procedural texture, or optional image_path (UV coords) with vertex_group mask.

tools.name: modifier_add_subdiv
tools.summary: Add Subdivision Surface modifier to object.

tools.name: object_convert_to_mesh
tools.summary: Convert a compatible object (e.g. CURVE / FONT / SURFACE / META) to a mesh via Blender's

tools.name: object_get_info
tools.summary: Inspect any object: Blender `type`, world-space dimensions in mm, and for CURVE objects a short

tools.name: ping
tools.summary: Health check. Returns the standard envelope with empty jewelry metrics placeholders.

tools.name: render_packshot
tools.summary: Run the jewelry packshot pipeline in one bridge call: shop scene prep, studio AREA rig, optional local HDRI world,

tools.name: render_still
tools.summary: Render the current scene to a single image file (write_still=True).

tools.name: run_script
tools.summary: Execute Python in Blender (requires BLENDER_MCP_ALLOW_SCRIPT_EXEC=1, confirm=True, addon pref).

tools.name: scene_delete_object
tools.summary: Delete one object by name (unlink + remove).

tools.name: scene_list_objects
tools.summary: List scene object names from active Blender session.

tools.name: scene_select_object
tools.summary: Select one object by name.

tools.name: scene_set_active
tools.summary: Set one object as active in current view layer.

tools.name: shop_ensure_scene
tools.summary: Prepare scene for packshots: METRIC units with 1 BU = 1 mm (scale_length 0.001), square-ish render resolution,

tools.name: studio_apply_lights
tools.summary: Place or update three neutral white Cycles AREA lights (key / fill / rim) in the studio collection.

tools.name: world_set_hdri
tools.summary: Set scene world to an HDRI from a local file path only (.exr / .hdr). Replaces the world shader node tree.
